items.title: LAMPOON in TMVR: Glimpse Into Real-world Outcomes
items.title_zh: LAMPOON 技术在经导管二尖瓣置换中的真实世界结局
items.summary_zh: TCTMD 报道 LAMPOON(经导管前叶电刀撕裂)技术预防 TMVR 术后左室流出道梗阻的真实世界数据,为解剖高危、缺乏常规治疗选择的二尖瓣患者提供该电外科技术在临床实践中可行性与结局的证据。
items.summary_en: TCTMD reports real-world outcomes for LAMPOON (transcatheter anterior-leaflet laceration) to prevent LVOT obstruction in TMVR, offering practical evidence on feasibility and results of this electrosurgical technique for anatomically high-risk mitral patients.
